title: wissadula caribaea
intro: Wissadula caribaea, also known as the West Indian horsefly weed or horsefly plant, is a plant species belonging to the hibiscus family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Wissadula caribaea has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antihelmintic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often employed in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
